---
name: Feature Request
about: Capture feature requests and enhancements with clear scope and acceptance criteria.
title: "[Feature]: <short imperative title>"
labels: ["needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!--
1-3 sentences.
State what this issue is about, who it impacts, and why it matters now.
-->

## Problem

<!--
Describe the current gap or failure mode.
What is not working, missing, or unclear today?
-->

## Current Risk

<!--
List concrete risks if we do nothing.
Prefer specific operational/product impact over generic statements.
-->

- 

## Desired Guarantee

<!--
State the end condition we can rely on after this issue is complete.
Phrase this as a durable behavior, not an implementation detail.
-->

## Scope (This Issue)

<!--
List the exact work included in this issue.
Use numbered items with concrete outcomes.
If helpful, include a short "Out of Scope" list to avoid ambiguity.
-->

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Acceptance Criteria

<!--
Use objective, testable checkboxes.
Each item should be verifiable in code, tests, docs, or runtime behavior.
-->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Suggested Implementation Areas

<!--
List likely files/directories/packages to touch.
Use repo-relative paths.
If unknown, write "TBD" and note where discovery should start.
-->

- `crates/...`
- `docs/...`

## Notes

<!--
Add constraints, design tradeoffs, rollout notes, migrations, or follow-ups.
Include links to related issues/PRs/specs if relevant.
-->
